response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience, currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq with direct hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation—precisely aligned with stated requirements. Demonstrates mastery of TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes across multiple roles. Strong testing culture and TDD practice underscore quality commitment. Primary gap is Nest.js not explicitly listed, though deep Node.js fundamentals and proven ability to master frameworks quickly (Ember.js, DLang, Swift) suggest this is easily addressable.
strengths: Currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators—directly aligned with job's AI agent development requirement
20-year track record across full-stack TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and proven ability to own complex systems end-to-end
Embedded testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored open-source testing frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), organized technical workshops demonstrating mentorship and communication skills
concerns: Nest.js framework not mentioned despite being primary backend requirement—would need onboarding to framework-specific patterns and conventions
React experience limited to single role (Optilyz); most frontend work used Ember.js or non-JavaScript stacks—depth in modern React ecosystem unclear
Specific testing frameworks (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not listed; testing culture is evident but hands-on experience with required tools needs clarification

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work experience
